summary: Backend refactoring verification complete - All 5 features tested and working: Assessments, Protocols, Recurring Appointments, Messages, and Availability. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All sidebar navigation and feature pages load correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified. All endpoints working: GET /api/assessments, GET /api/assessments/library, GET /api/assessments/custom, GET /api/protocols, GET /api/protocols/templates, GET /api/recurring-appointments, GET /api/messaging-contacts, GET /api/messages, GET /api/messages/unread-count, GET /api/availability, GET /api/blocked-times, GET /api/blocked-time, GET /api/session-notes

assessments_list.notes: Returns list of assessments (23 total, 8 pending, 15 completed)

assessment_library.notes: Returns all standard assessment types: PHQ-9, GAD-7, PCL-5, ASRS, BDI-II, DASS-21

custom_assessments.notes: Route order fix working - /custom endpoint accessible before /{assessment_id}

protocols_list.notes: Returns list of protocols for therapist

protocol_templates.notes: Returns 5 templates: CBT_ANXIETY, CBT_DEPRESSION, DBT_SKILLS, ACT_GENERAL, TRAUMA_PROCESSING

recurring_appointments.notes: Returns list of recurring patterns (1 pattern for Test Client Alpha)

messaging_contacts.notes: Returns list of contacts with unread counts

availability.notes: Returns availability settings with session_duration, buffer_time, and weekly schedule

blocked_times.notes: Returns list of blocked time slots with field mapping fix (start_time/end_time)

frontend_verification.assessments_page: PASS - Shows 23 assessments with Library, Custom, Assign buttons
frontend_verification.protocols_page: PASS - Shows Treatment Protocols with Templates and New Protocol buttons
frontend_verification.recurring_page: PASS - Shows Recurring Appointments with existing pattern
frontend_verification.messages_page: PASS - Shows messaging interface with conversations list
